com.mentor.chs.plugin.scoping

Interface IXScopeSelector<o extends IXScopeFilter>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEvaluation<o>, IXPlugin

    @OnlyOneImplementationAllowed
public interface IXScopeSelector<o extends IXScopeFilter>
extends IXEvaluation<o>
    Any Scope Plugin should implement this interface and Capital Applications will call the plugin to get scoping filters(IXScopeFilter) which needs to be applied to evaluate the scope of component. Two types of filters are currently supported, IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter and IXComponentScopeSelectionFilter

    Sample usage of the plugin implementation: 

            public class LibraryDrivenScopeSelector implements IXScopeSelector
        {
        public IXEvaluator[] getEvaluators()
                {
                        return new IXScopeFilter[]{new LibraryDrivenComponentScopeFilter(), new LibraryDrivenHousingScopeFilter()};
                }
        };
    See Also:
    IXComponentScopeSelectionFilter, IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter, IXEvaluation

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter.IXEvaluation

        getEvaluators

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
